rationale: Faithful v12 Task 2 implementation within frozen scope. Private-Set facades (mutators throw; forEach third arg is the facade, not the backing set) for NODE_KINDS/EDGE_KINDS/ASSERTION_STATUS with exact closed membership. canonicalJson enforces plain/dense/finite/no-cycle rules with code-unit key sort. Per-kind locator schemas carry repository_ref + the correct content binding (blob_sha/text_sha256/entry_hash/summary_sha256) except the named commit exception; requireExactKeys rejects missing/extra/inherited-enumerable/symbol/non-enumerable-required fields. deriveNodeId/docAddressKey use exact outer schemas. validateEdgeInput requires explicit from_node/to_node (64-hex) AND from_locator/to_locator ({kind,locator}), validates locators, then REJECTS any stated-id vs deriveNodeId mismatch; endpoint matrix (incl. all four depends-on rows and the v2.3 discharges matrix) is applied from locator kinds; supersedes is same-kind + human/model. Status/assertor coupling uses private WEAVER_IDS (not exported); nonempty model:<seat> enforced. deriveRepositoryRef accepts only exact git-output forms (true→ShallowRepositoryError with CLOTHO_SHALLOW_REPOSITORY; non-false≠true→malformed distinct from shallow; multi-root and non-40-hex root fatal; no free-form trim). ShallowRepositoryError is module-private. Real-git D18 fixture uses a private fixture-only no-shell allowlist (init/config/add/commit/clone/rev-*) — not a Task 4a weaver wrapper — and proves shallow reject + full clone git-root:<origin root>. Injected units cover the complementary branches. Zero runtime deps, ESM, node: only, clotho/ confined, no spine change, no scope expansion. Deterministic gate meets. Accept AS-IS.
